name: Miro
description: An online whiteboard for strategic workshops, market mapping, prioritisation exercises, and collaborative planning sessions.
whyUseIt: Miro is valuable when strategic work requires visual thinking - mapping options, aligning stakeholders, or running workshops that are too messy for a standard document.
aiCapabilities: Miro AI can cluster sticky notes, generate summaries from workshop boards, propose diagrams, and turn raw workshop output into cleaner next-step structures.
